topic: My microwave clock shows eighty eight colon eighty eight every night at exactly two AM
title: My Microwave Clock Shows 88:88 Every Night at Exactly 2 AM | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My microwave clock shows eighty eight colon eighty eight every night at exactly two AM. The display does not blink.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an over the stove microwave at night in a dark kitchen with the digital display reading eight eight colon eight eight in green digits, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Galley kitchen. One bedroom apartment. Lived here nine years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small galley kitchen at night with cabinets on both sides and a microwave over the stove, dim overhead light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep odd hours. Drink water at two.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a glass of water on a kitchen counter beside a stainless steel sink, dim ambient kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Noticed last winter the display went dim for thirty seconds. Same time every night.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a microwave digital display reading two zero zero AM in green digits, dim kitchen ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Set up a timer to watch.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone propped on a kitchen counter angled at a microwave display, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Not dim. Changes to eight eight colon eight eight. Holds for thirty seconds. Returns.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a microwave digital display reading eight eight colon eight eight in bright green digits against a dark kitchen background, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand pulling a microwave plug from a wall outlet behind a kitchen counter, only the hand visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Display stayed lit. No power. Same eight digits.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of an unplugged microwave with the digital display still glowing eight eight colon eight eight at night, the power cord visible hanging loose, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Stood in front of it last Tuesday at two AM. Watched the digits change.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dark kitchen at night with a single person seen from behind facing a glowing microwave, no face visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Eight digits rearranged into the month and day and year I was born.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a microwave digital display showing a sequence of green digits that form a date with hyphens visible between sets, dim kitchen background, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Took the microwave to a recycling center. Bought a new one.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of an electronics recycling drop off bin at dusk with a microwave visible on top of the pile, dim warehouse lighting, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The new microwave does the same thing. Same digits. Same time. Same birthdate.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a brand new microwave installed over a kitchen stove with the display glowing eight eight colon eight eight at night, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
